query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  MIN(firstSeen) as oldest,
  MAX(firstSeen) as newest,
  SUM(CASE WHEN firstSeen > (UNIX_TIMESTAMP() - 86400) * 1000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as last_24h,
  SUM(CASE WHEN firstSeen > (UNIX_TIMESTAMP() - 172800) * 1000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as last_48h
FROM listings;
